cot_prefix: Okay, let's see. The question is about figuring out when Andrew could have gone to the clothing store, based on the times he was seen doing other activities. Let me go through the information step by step. First, we know that Andrew woke up at 5am. Then, William saw him playing tennis from 5am to 6am. So from 5 to 6, he's at the tennis court. Then Jessica saw him buying lunch at the deli from 6am to 9am. So that's 6 to 9 am at the deli. Then Tiffany saw him taking photos near the Leaning Tower of Pisa from 9am to 11am. So 9 to 11 am there. John saw him waiting at the train station from 11am to 5pm. That's a long stretch, 11am until 5pm. Then Sarah saw him reading at the library from 6pm to 9pm. Also a long time. The clothing store was closed after 9pm, so he had to go before that. Now, we need to find out when Andrew wasn't doing any of these activities, so
